description_long: This is a modern, boxy armchair with a plush, light gray seat and backrest, complemented by a darker taupe exterior shell. The chair features thick, padded armrests and a high back, providing ample support and comfort. A single, large, matching throw pillow rests against the backrest, adding to the cozy appearance. The exterior sides and back are upholstered in a vertically ribbed fabric, contrasting with the smooth inner surfaces. The chair sits on small, barely visible golden feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall design suggests a blend of contemporary style and comfort, suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with light gray upholstery, taupe ribbed exterior, and a plush throw pillow, designed for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Side-rear view showing the ribbed taupe exterior and the chair's thick, padded armrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, smooth seat, high backrest, and the large throw pillow.
description_view_2: Opposite side-rear view, again showing the ribbed exterior and the pillow nestled in the corner.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the ribbed taupe back and the top of the backrest with pillow visible.
